calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Aquilina.
George Choulos and Anna Dubrovsky, Esq., for Plaintiff: Michael Menaster.
Collin Jewell, Esq., for Defendants: Christopher Heffelfinger and Marcia Heffelfinger.
09:35 am. - Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $17,500.00, documents and released of liability will be signed and settlement check will be issued with in two weeks, there after the dismissal with prejudice to be filed by the Plaintiff.
Parties understand and agreed to terms, the Court deemed matter settled, trial date is vacated.
